TextView.android:text: Choose what you want to receive daily.

All entries and estimates are for personal reference and may be inaccurate. This feature is not contraception and does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. If you have severe pain, heavy or irregular bleeding, pregnancy concerns, or urgent symptoms, seek help from a qualified healthcare professional.
Select your last period start date to calculate approximate cycle-day and period-date estimates.
Track flow, symptoms, wellbeing, and energy for today (for personal reference).
